{{Infobox character
| name = judge
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[judge]] oversees the matches.}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“You’re alive because you were a Judge’s pet.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
